column1: # Each row = one supply chain relationship:  supplier → customer

#   Layout D:               supplier        + customer         (tries ticker then name)
#   relationship_strength   How critical is this link?   0.0 – 1.0
#   • Unknown tickers/names produce a warning and are skipped (not a hard error)
